connectorUiConfig.title: Tailscale Logging
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The [Tailscale](https://tailscale.com/) Logging data connector ingests configuration audit logs and network flow logs from the [Tailscale API](https://tailscale.com/api) into Microsoft Sentinel, authenticating with an OAuth 2.0 client-credentials client.

sampleQueries.description: Get a sample of Tailscale configuration audit logs
Get a sample of Tailscale network flow logs

dataTypes.name: TailscaleAuditLogs_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
TailscaleAuditLogs_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: TailscaleNetworkLogs_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
TailscaleNetworkLogs_CL
 | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
 | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Tailscale API access
customs.description: An OAuth client created in the Tailscale admin console with the `logs:configuration:read` and `logs:network:read` scopes is required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect Tailscale to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description:
1) In the Tailscale admin console, go to **Settings > OAuth clients** and select **Generate OAuth client**. 
 2) Grant the client the **`logs:configuration:read`** and **`logs:network:read`** scopes, then generate it. 
 3) Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** before leaving the page and store them securely — the secret is shown only once. 
 4) Below, enter your **Tailnet** (the organization name shown in the admin console, e.g. `example.com`, or `-` for the default tailnet), then provide the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** and select **Connect**.
